title: oxyceros malabaricus
intro: Oxyceros malabaricus, also known as the Malabar hornbill tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oxyceros malabaricus include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its use in reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine in certain parts of the world.
